recommendations.title: Baaghi 3
recommendations.overview: A man embarks on a bloody rampage to save his kidnapped brother.

recommendations.title: Jungle Run
recommendations.overview: A brother and sister's journey into the jungle to find their missing father.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero
recommendations.overview: The Red Ribbon Army, an evil organization that was once destroyed by Goku in the past, has been reformed by a group of people who have created new and mightier Androids, Gamma 1 and Gamma 2, and seek vengeance against Goku and his family.

recommendations.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Battle of the Realms
recommendations.overview: The Earthrealm heroes must journey to the Outworld and fight for the survival of their homeland, invaded by the forces of evil warlord Shao Kahn, in the tournament to end all tournaments: the final Mortal Kombat.

recommendations.title: Pimpinero: Blood and Oil
recommendations.overview: When Juan, a young gasoline smuggler, is forced to work for a mysterious organization in the desert bordering Colombia and Venezuela, his girlfriend Diana embarks on a journey to uncover the secrets that inhabit this no-man’s-land.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! The Sword and the Scoob
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Mystery, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: An evil sorceress transports the gang back to the age of chivalrous knights, spell-casting wizards, and fire-breathing dragons.
recommendations.director: Maxwell Atoms, Christina Sotta, Melchior Zwyer

recommendations.title: Wonder Woman
recommendations.overview: An Amazon princess comes to the world of Man in the grips of the First World War to confront the forces of evil and bring an end to human conflict.

recommendations.title: Return of the Jedi

recommendations.director: Jean Duval, Frank Passingham, Dave Borthwick

recommendations.title: Outcast
recommendations.overview: A mysterious warrior teams up with the daughter and son of a deposed Chinese Emperor to defeat their cruel brother, who seeks their deaths.
